name: Instana (IBM)
description: Instana (IBM) — Automated application performance monitoring and observability platform with automated discovery and dependency mapping.

seo.title: Instana (IBM) — Crash Reporting
seo.meta_description: Instana (IBM): Instana (IBM) — Automated application performance monitoring and observability platform with automated discovery and dependency mapping.

when_to_use: Automated APM with dependency mapping for microservices environments
Real-time performance monitoring without manual instrumentation setup
Incident detection and root cause analysis for containerized applications
IBM Cloud and on-premise observability for enterprise application monitoring

pros: Automatic service discovery and dependency mapping
APM with distributed tracing out of the box
cons: Enterprise pricing; opaque to smaller teams
IBM acquisition slowed some product velocity
Not specifically a crash reporting tool
Heavier agent footprint than newer APMs
review.verdict: Capable enterprise APM, but evaluate Datadog and New Relic if you want more momentum and transparent pricing.
review.best_for: IBM-aligned enterprises needing full-stack APM with auto-discovery
review.not_for: Startups wanting focused crash reporting or cheap APM
